resultList.dtldesc: Embrace luxury living in this exquisite 3 BHK villa for sale in Neredmet, Hyderabad With a construction age of less than 5 years, this modern home is designed for comfort and style. Its Vaastu compliant layout ensures a harmonious living space, while the west-facing orientation allows for stunning evening views. This is an opportunity you wontProperty SpecificationsStep into this beautifully designed property featuring a super area of 1832 sqft and a carpet area of 916 sqft, offering a perfect blend of comfort and style across ground and first floors. The 1-2 km proximity to hospitals, the presence of malls and supermarkets on walking distance, makes it perfectly convenient for daily needs.Public transport in the form of buses and autos is easily accessible, providing convenient commutation. Banks and ATMs are easily accessible nearby, and Ammuguda Railway Station is just 300 meters away from the location, with JBS Metro Station being just 4 km away from the area, providing better connectivity for residents.

resultList.dtldesc: A well-designed 3 BHK flat in Janapriya Metropolis, Moti Nagar, offers comfortable living with modern amenities and excellent connectivity. With spacious interiors and a functional layout, this home ensures a perfect balance of convenience and style.::::::Property Specifications::::::This fully furnished 3 BHK flat spans a carpet area of 1,250 sq. ft., offering a well-planned living space that is both comfortable and functional. Situated on the 5th floor of a five-story building, the West-facing, Vaastu-compliant home ensures a positive and harmonious atmosphere.::::::The layout includes three bedrooms, two with attached bathrooms and one common bathroom, all fitted with Western-style fixtures and geyser points. Hospitals are within 100 meters, while malls, supermarkets, banks, and ATMs are all within a 1 km radius. Public transport options, including buses and autos, are easily accessible, with Erragadda Metro Station just a 2-minute walk away. This property offers the perfect mix of comfort, convenience, and accessibility, making it an excellent choice for modern urban living.

resultList.dtldesc: Experience luxurious living in this stunning 3 BHK flat for sale in Safah Eminence, Banjara Hills, Hyderabad. This property is 100% Vaastu compliant, ensuring a harmonious environment, with the main entrance facing east to welcome the morning sun.::::::::::::Property Specifications ::::::::::::Discover this spacious 3 BHK flat situated on the ground floor, offering a perfect opportunity for customization as it comes unfurnished. The flat features three bedrooms, each with its own attached western-style bathroom-one bathroom is conveniently located near the living room, while the other two are attached to the bedrooms.::::::::::::Enjoy the fresh air from the balcony attached to the living room, along with an additional wash area balcony connected to the kitchen. The kitchen is a normal kitchen without any additional fittings, but it does include a piped gas connection for your cooking needs. ::::::::::::While the bathrooms currently have no fixtures like geysers or shower cubicles, they are ready for connections. The apartment is equipped with essential electrical fixtures such as lights and fans, ensuring a comfortable living environment.::::::::::::Facilities::::::::::::This property boasts a range of modern amenities, including a grand entrance pavilion, swimming pool, and gym. It is GHMC & RERA approved and features 24x7 security with CCTV surveillance for your peace of mind. The community is designed with lush green landscaping, rainwater harvesting, and generator backup for the clubhouse. With Schindler elevators and a total of twenty-five 3 BHK apartments, this society is both contemporary and functional. Additionally, two covered parking spaces are available for purchase at 10 lakh.::::::::::::Locality::::::::::::The flat is conveniently located near several essential amenities, including schools, markets, malls, and hospitals. Public transport connectivity in the area is excellent, making commuting easy. Notable nearby landmarks include the Sri Peddamma Thalli Temple, NIMS Hospital, Inox GVK One Mall, and Taj Deccan. ::::::::::::Other nearby facilities include Q-Mart, PVR RK Cineplex, Star Hospitals, and various educational institutions like BSD DAV Public School and Jubilee Hills Public School. This locality offers a vibrant community atmosphere, perfect for families and individuals alike, ensuring that all your daily needs are just a stone's throw away.

resultList.dtldesc: Experience peaceful and private living in this thoughtfully designed 3BHK unfurnished apartment located in Bandlaguda Jagir, Hyderabad. Ideal for families seeking a ready-to-move-in home with premium finishes and modern comforts, this boutique project combines practicality, privacy, and strategic connectivity, making it a desirable choice for urban homeowners.Property SpecificationsSituated on the 2nd floor of a 5-storey building with only two flats per floor, this east-facing apartment ensures excellent sunlight, ventilation, and privacy. The super built-up area spans 1,150 sq. ft, featuring three bedrooms, each with an attached western-style bathroom. The layout includes one spacious balcony-cum-utility area attached to the kitchen overlooking a 30-ft main road. The apartment is completely unfurnished, allowing residents to personalise the interiors, and is finished with premium 24 feet vitrified tiles throughout the living areas, bedrooms, kitchen, and balcony. The kitchen is fitted with a black granite platform and stainless steel sink, and provisions are available for geysers, wardrobes, and a flat inverter.FacilitiesThis boutique residential complex comprises only ten flats, offering an exclusive living experience. Residents enjoy 247 security with CCTV, dedicated covered car parking, lift access, and power backup for common areas. The apartment is fully Vaastu compliant with the main entrance facing east. Despite its intimate scale, the project ensures all essential amenities for a comfortable lifestyle, without the bustle of large-scale societies.LocalityLocated in Bandlaguda Jagir, the property benefits from excellent connectivity to Hyderabads key hubs. Schools such as Glendale Academy, Phoenix Greens, and Army Public School, along with hospitals including Apollo Spectra and Mythri Hospital, are within a short drive. Shopping and entertainment options such as Mantra Mall, D-Mart, Metro Cash  Carry, and various multiplexes are easily accessible. Budvel Railway Station is approximately 4 km away, with the upcoming Rajendranagar Metro Station just 67 km from the property. The area offers excellent public transport, including shared autos, TSRTC buses, and cab services, with Hyderabad Airport and Gachibowli Financial District reachable within 2530 minutes.
